question: How can I get a free trial of the Vyapar app, and what are the limits and duration?
answer:
A **free trial** allows you to try the Vyapar app to understand its features and suitability for your business.

#### **Free Trial & Free Usage Details**

##### **Mobile App (Android & iOS)**
- The Vyapar mobile app is **free to use**, but with **limitations**
- There is **no time-based free trial** on mobile

In the free mobile version:
- You can create up to **5 bills per week**
- You can create up to **2 companies**
- **Premium features are not available**

To remove these limits, you must **purchase a Vyapar license**.

---

##### **Desktop App (Windows & Mac)**
- The Vyapar Desktop app provides a **7-day free trial**
- The trial starts from the **first login**

During the 7-day trial:
- **Unlimited bills** can be created
- **Unlimited companies** can be created
- **All premium features** are available

After the trial ends:
- Premium features are disabled
- You can **only view existing data**
- You **cannot create or edit bills**

To continue using the Desktop app, **purchasing a license is mandatory**.

---

#### **How to get the free trial**
- **Desktop**: Download the app from **vyaparapp.in** and log in for the first time
- **Mobile**: Download the app from the **Play Store (Android)** or **App Store (iOS)**

The free trial (Desktop) or free version (Mobile) is **automatically applied** on first login.

---

#### **Important Notes**
- If the app asks you to purchase a license immediately, it means the **free trial was already used earlier**
- Free trial **cannot be extended**
- If the user insists on trial extension, **escalate to a senior agent**

---

question: How do I attach or activate my Vyapar license on a device?
answer:
After purchasing a **Vyapar license**, it must be **manually attached to the device** using the **same mobile number or email ID** that was used at the time of purchase.  
If the license is **not attached**, **premium features will not activate**.

---

## **Steps to attach or activate a Vyapar license**

### **Android Mobile App**
- Open the app and go to **Menu → Plans & Pricing**
- Tap the **three dots (top-right corner)** and select **Attach License**
- Under **“I already have a license”**, tap **Attach License**
- Log in using the **license-registered mobile number or email**
- Ignore the **“Enter License Code”** option if it appears
- Scroll down to view the **active license list** (license name and validity)
- Select the required license
- Tap **Attach / Change to this device**
- You will see **“License attached successfully”**

**Note:**  
If no license appears, make sure you are logged in with the **correct registered mobile number or email**.

---

### **iOS Mobile App**
- Open the app and go to **More → Plans & Pricing → Attach License**
- Log in using the **license-registered mobile number or email**
- Ignore the **“Enter License Code”** option if it appears
- Scroll down to view the **active license list**
- Select the required license
- Tap **Attach / Change to this device**
- You will see **“License attached successfully”**

**Note:**  
If no license appears, confirm that you used the **correct registered mobile number or email**.

---

### **Desktop App (Windows & Mac)**
- Open the app and go to **Menu**
- **Scroll down to the very bottom** of the menu list  
        *Plans & Pricing is the **last option** in the Menu*
- Click on **Plans & Pricing** 
- Click the **three dots (top-right corner)** and select **Attach License**
- Log in using the **license-registered mobile number or email**
- Ignore the **“Enter License Code”** option if it appears
- Scroll down to view the **active license list**
- Select the required license
- Click **Change to this device**
- You will see **“License attached successfully”**

**Note:**  
If no license appears, verify that you are logged in with the **license-registered details**.

---

## **Important Notes**
- If the **“Attach License”** option is **not visible** under the three-dot menu:
  - Ask the user to **check the three-dot menu again carefully**
  - If it is still not visible, it means the **license is already attached** to this device
- In that case:
  - Open **License Info** from the same three-dot menu
  - Check the **attached license name**
  - Check the **license validity / expiry date**

If license details are visible but **premium features are still locked**:
- Ensure the **device date and time** are set correctly
- **Close the app completely** and reopen it

This usually resolves the issue without any further action.  
If the issue still continues, **escalate the case to a senior agent**.

question: Why is my Vyapar license not visible after logging in during license attachment?
answer:
If the **Vyapar license is not visible** after logging in during the license attachment process, it can be due to one of the following reasons:

---
#### **Possible reasons**
- You are logged in using a **mobile number or email that is not registered** with the license purchase, or
- The license was **purchased recently** and is **still being generated**

---
#### **Important Notes**
- After a successful purchase, **license generation can take up to 30 minutes**
- During this time, the license **may not appear immediately** in the license list

---
#### **What you should do**
- Make sure you are logging in with the **same mobile number or email** used at the time of license purchase
- Wait for **up to 30 minutes** after payment completion

---

#### **When to Escalate**
- If the license is **still not visible after 30 minutes**, even after logging in with the **correct registered mobile number or email**  

➡️ **Escalate the case to a senior agent** for further verification and assistance.

question: I purchased a Vyapar plan, but the app still shows “Subscription Over”, ads, or asks “Get Gold / Get Silver”. What should I check?
answer:
If you have **already purchased a Vyapar plan** but still see **ads**, **“Subscription Over”**, or **“Get Gold / Get Silver”** while creating a sale bill, follow the steps below.

---

### **Step 1: Check whether the license is attached**
- Go to **Menu → Plans & Pricing → License Info**

**Result check:**
- If **license details are visible** → The license is **attached** to this device
- If **no license details are visible** → The license is **not attached**

➡️ **Action:**  
Attach the license to the **current device**.

---

### **Step 2: Check device date and time**
If the license is visible but the issue still continues:
- Ensure the **device date and time** are correct
- Keep **Date & Time** set to **Automatic**

---

### **Step 3: Restart the app**
- Close the app completely
- Reopen the app
- Try creating the sale bill again

✅ In most cases, this resolves the issue.

---

### **Important Note**
- **Ads and watermarks are removed only after the correct license is attached** to the device
- Simply purchasing a license is **not enough**—it must be **attached to the device**

---

### **When to Escalate**
- If the issue **still persists after completing all the above steps**  

➡️ **Escalate the case to a senior agent** for further verification and resolution.

question: How does the Vyapar licensing system work (device limits and multiple devices)?
answer:
Vyapar licensing is **device-based**, not company-based.  
This means **one license can be used on only one device at a time**.

- A **Mobile license** can be used on **one mobile device only**
- A **Desktop license** can be used on **one desktop device only**
- A **Combo plan** allows usage on:
  - **One mobile device**, and  
  - **One desktop device**

To use Vyapar on **additional devices**, you must purchase **separate licenses**.

When a license is **renewed**:
- The **same license ID remains**
- Only the **validity period is extended**
- No new license is generated

question: Can I use a mobile license on my desktop or a desktop license on my mobile?
answer:
No. You **cannot use a mobile license on a desktop**, and you **cannot use a desktop license on a mobile**.

- A **Mobile license** works **only on mobile devices**
- A **Desktop license** works **only on desktop PCs or laptops**
- To use Vyapar on **both mobile and desktop**, you must purchase a **Mobile + Desktop (Combo) plan**

question: I changed my device — do I need to buy a new license? How often can I change devices?
answer:
No, you **do not need to buy a new license** if you change your device.

- You can **re-attach the existing license to the new device** 
- A single license can be used on **only one device at a time**  
  (except for a **Combo plan**, which allows one mobile and one desktop)
- You can **change devices multiple times**, but:
  - The license must be **manually re-attached each time** from **Plans & Pricing**
  - Only **one active device** can use the license at any moment

Frequent device changes may require you to **attach the license again on each new device**.

question: When attaching a license, I get errors like “already linked to another user” or “license associated with another user”. How do I fix this?
answer:
This error can occur due to the following reasons:
- A **license is already attached to the current device**, and you are trying to attach **another license**
- The **date and time settings** on your device are incorrect
- A **VPN is enabled** on your device

**Steps to fix the issue:**
- First, **attach the license that is currently linked to this device on another device**  
  This will **automatically detach** it from the existing device
- After that, **attach the correct license** on the current device
- Ensure the **device date and time** are set correctly (preferably set to **Automatic**)
- **Disable any VPN** before attaching the license

After completing these steps, try attaching the license again.  
If the issue still persists, **escalate the case to a senior agent**.

question: How can I detach a Vyapar license from my old device or from the current device?
answer:
If your Vyapar license is **already attached to another device**, or if it is **attached to your current device and you want to detach it**, you do **not need to manually remove it first**.

- Simply **attach the same license to another device** using the **license-registered mobile number or email**
- Once the license is successfully attached to the **new device**, it will be **automatically detached** from the device where it was previously attached
- Only **one device can use a single license at a time**

This automatic transfer ensures that the license is always active on **only one device at a time**.

---

#### **Important Notes**
- To **detach a license**, it must be **attached to another device**
- The **new device must not already have any license attached**, otherwise the **Attach License option will not be visible**

---

#### **When to Escalate**
- If the customer is **unable to follow the steps**, or  
- If the customer says they **do not have another device** to attach the license  

➡️ **Escalate the case to a senior agent** for further assistance.

question: How many companies can I create or access in Vyapar Free Trial or with a purchased license? Will companies get locked if the license is missing?
answer:
The number of companies you can create or access in Vyapar depends on the **plan you are using**.

#### Company limits by plan
- **Free Trial (Desktop – Windows & Mac)**: Unlimited companies  
- **Free Version (Mobile App)**: Up to **2 companies**
- **Vyapar Silver Plan**: Up to **3 companies**
- **Vyapar Gold Plan**: Up to **5 companies**
- **Manufacturing Pro**: Unlimited companies
- **Retail Pro**: Unlimited companies
- **Distributor Pro**: Unlimited companies
- **Vyapar Platinum**: Unlimited companies

#### What happens if you exceed the company limit?
- If you create **more companies than allowed** by your license:
  - The **extra companies will get locked**
- To unlock them, you need to **upgrade to a license plan** that supports more or unlimited companies.

#### What happens if the license is missing or expired?
- **Companies are not deleted**
- **All data remains safe**
- **Transaction entry is locked** until:
  - The license is **attached**, or
  - The license is **renewed**

Once the correct license is attached or renewed, all companies and transactions become accessible again.

13. Send alerts on **transaction updates**

  - Gold: **Up to 5 firms**

question: My Desktop license shows expired, but my mobile is still active (I have a Combo plan). Why is this happening, and what should I check?

- Mobile and Desktop licenses can be **attached on different dates**
- Because of this, **one device can show expiry earlier than the other**

- The **Desktop license is not attached** to the PC
- The **Desktop license is attached to another PC**
- The **Desktop part of the combo was attached earlier** and has expired before the mobile part

#### **What you should do**
- Check whether the **Desktop license is attached** on the required PC
- If not attached, **attach the Desktop license separately** on the PC from **Plans & Pricing**
- Ensure the Desktop license is **not attached to another device**

Once the Desktop license is correctly attached to the intended PC, the issue should be resolved.

question: Is barcode **scanner** usage free in Vyapar? Are there any license or platform restrictions?

#### **Is barcode scanner free?**
Yes. The **barcode scanner feature is free to use** in Vyapar.

However:
- To **create transactions or generate bills using barcode scanning**, a **paid Vyapar license** is required.
- Without a paid license:
  - You can **scan or view items**
  - You **cannot save bills or complete transactions**
---

#### **Platform-wise barcode scanner support**

- **Mobile App (Android & iOS)**:
  - Go to **Menu → Settings → Items**
  - Enable **Barcode Scan**
  - Barcode scanning works using:
    - The **mobile phone camera**, or
    - A **supported external barcode scanner**

- **Desktop App (Windows & Mac)**:
  - Go to **Menu → Settings → Items**
  - Enable **Barcode Scan**
  - Requires a **compatible external barcode scanner hardware**
  - The scanner must be properly connected to the desktop or laptop

---

#### **Important Checks**
To use **barcode scanning (scanner)** without issues:
- Ensure a **paid Vyapar license** is active and attached (for billing)
- Ensure **Barcode Scan** is enabled in **Settings → Items**
- Ensure the required **barcode scanner hardware** (for Desktop) is properly connected

 The **currently attached license must be detached first**.

question: The app is asking for a paid subscription when I try to create or edit bills, invoices, or estimates, even though I am using the free mobile app. How can I fix this?
answer:
This issue usually occurs because the **Sync feature is enabled**, which is a **premium feature** and requires an **active Vyapar license**.

---

#### **Why this happens**
- **Sync is a premium feature**
- If **Sync is enabled without a license attached**, the app will:
  - Ask for a **paid subscription**
  - **Block creation or editing** of invoices, sales, estimates, or bills
- Without a valid license, you can **only view existing data and reports**

---

## **Solution (Mobile App)**

### **Step 1: Check if a license is already purchased**

#### **Case 1: License is already purchased**
- Make sure the **license is attached to the current device**
- Go to **Menu → Plans & Pricing → License Info**
  - If license details are **visible** → License is attached
  - If license details are **not visible** → License is not attached  

  **Action:** Attach the license to the device  
Once attached:
- **Sync can remain ON**
- Premium features will work normally

---

#### **Case 2: License is NOT purchased (User wants to use free app)**
If the user wants to continue using the **free mobile app**:

**Disable Sync**
- Open the app
- Go to **Menu (More)**
- Tap **Sync & Share**
- Tap the **three dots (⋮)**
- Select **Disable Sync**

After disabling Sync:
- You will be able to **create and edit entries in free mode**

---

#### **Important Notes (Free Mode)**
- In free mode:
  - You can create **up to 5 bills per week**
- To remove this limitation and use all features:
  - A **paid Vyapar license** is required

---

#### **Data Safety Recommendation**
To keep your data safe while using free mode:
- Go to **Menu → Backup & Restore → Auto Backup**
- **Enable Auto Backup**

This ensures your data remains safe even without Sync enabled.

question: Do I need a separate Vyapar license for each device I connect via Sync?
answer:

- Even if multiple devices are **connected using Sync**:
  - **Each device** that **creates or edits transactions** must have its **own license**
- **Sync is only for data sharing**
  - It **does not share or transfer a license** between devices

- **License = Device-based**
- **Sync = Data sharing only**
- Multiple devices creating/editing data → **Separate licenses required for each device**

To avoid restrictions on any synced device, ensure that a **valid license is attached to each device** where transactions are created or edited.

question: Why is the Vyapar Desktop license priced higher than the Mobile license?
answer:
The **Vyapar Desktop license is priced higher** because it provides **advanced business, accounting, and operational features** that are **not available or are limited on the mobile app**. It is designed for **high-volume billing, accounting, and professional business use**.

---

#### **Key reasons why Desktop license costs more**

##### **1. Advanced accounting & compliance features**
The Desktop app supports:
- Full **accounting module**
- **Audit trail**
- **Journal vouchers**
- **Chart of accounts**
- **Accountant access**
- Detailed **profit & loss and financial reports**

These features are critical for businesses that require **proper bookkeeping and compliance**.

---

##### **2. High-volume billing & POS operations**
Desktop license supports:
- **POS / Quick billing**
- **Multiple sales bill tabs**
- **Bulk printing**
- **Quick entry**
- **Lite sale**
- **Stop negative sale**

This makes Desktop suitable for **retail stores, wholesalers, and distributors** handling large daily transactions.

---

##### **3. Bulk operations & automation**
Desktop allows:
- **Bulk update of items**
- **Bulk assign item codes**
- **Rearrangement and customization of item tables**
- **Global search**
- **Convert multiple delivery challans and sales orders**
- **Import from Tally / Export to Tally**

These save time and reduce manual effort, which is not possible on mobile.

---

##### **4. Hardware & third-party integrations**
Desktop supports professional integrations such as:
- **Barcode generation**
- **EDC machine integration**
- **Weighing scale integration**
- **Razorpay integration**
- **POS hardware compatibility**

These integrations are essential for **store-based and accountant-driven businesses**.

---

##### **5. Designed for professional & multi-user environments**
The Desktop app is built for:
- **Accountants**
- **Multi-firm and multi-user setups**
- **Businesses managing large inventories and reports**

This level of control and scalability is not required by most mobile-only users.

---

#### **Why Mobile license is cheaper**
The Mobile app is optimized for:
- On-the-go billing
- Small businesses
- Basic invoicing and inventory
- Lower transaction volume
- Fewer integrations and controls

---

#### **Simple explanation**
- **Mobile license** → Basic billing, portability, lower cost  
- **Desktop license** → Advanced accounting, POS, automation, integrations, higher cost  

You are paying more for the Desktop license because it delivers **powerful tools that directly support larger operations, compliance, and efficiency**.

question: Can I make part payments, pay monthly/EMI, and how do I see the final price?
answer:
**Answer:**
Vyapar supports **auto-pay–based payments** for license purchases.

#### **Auto-pay details**
- Auto-pay works in **3-month billing cycles**
- Payments continue **automatically** unless the user cancels manually
- **UPI is the only supported payment method** for auto-pay
- Auto-pay is currently in an **experimental phase**
- Auto-pay cannot be accessed from the **Utilities** section

#### **Plan validity rules**
- Plan validity follows a **date-to-date cycle**
  - Example: Purchased on **01-01-2026 → Expires on 01-03-2026**
- Users can **upgrade their plan at any time**
  - Remaining validity value is adjusted automatically

#### **If auto-pay fails**
- System retries payment **up to 3 times after 92 days**
- During retries, a **pop-up** appears on the **Plans & Pricing** page showing remaining validity
- If all retries fail, the **license is automatically cancelled**

#### **Refund**
- If payment is **accidentally deducted multiple times**, a **refund is issued**

---

question: **I have two laptops. On one laptop I am getting a discounted renewal price, but on another laptop (where an IndiaMART license is attached) I am seeing the new license price. Why is this happening?**
answer:
This happens because **IndiaMART-provided Vyapar licenses are free promotional licenses**, not paid licenses.

#### **Reason**
- IndiaMART users receive **up to 6 months of Vyapar license free** as part of a promotional offer
- **Renewal discounts are applicable only on paid Vyapar licenses**
- Since the IndiaMART license is **free**, it is treated as a **new purchase** at the time of renewal
- That is why:
  - On the device with a **paid license** → **discounted renewal price** is shown
  - On the device with an **IndiaMART free license** → **new license price** is shown

#### **Important Note**
- Renewal discounts (such as 10%) apply **only to paid licenses**
- Free or promotional licenses (like IndiaMART) **do not qualify** for renewal discounts

#### **What you can do**
- If you want renewal benefits and discounts:
  - Purchase a **paid Vyapar license**
- Once a paid license is active, future renewals will show **discounted renewal pricing**
